summary: Decent unknown‑source recording captures a dreamy second half highlighted by an extended Help > Slipknot tease and a superb Stella Blue.
review: The reviewer describes this show as a standout experience, especially noting Jerry's extended tease moving from “Help on the Way” into “Slipknot!” and a breathtaking performance of “Stella Blue.” No recording flaws are mentioned, implying the tape is at least listenable, while the second set is praised as a dream‑like sequence.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the performance and standout songs; no recording issues noted but source type unknown, so rating reflects good show with uncertain audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewers did not note any problems, suggesting the recording is at least acceptable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second half described as a dream with strong flow, especially the extended tease and emotional ballad.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Extended tease from Help into Slipknot highlighted; praised for his improvisational groove.
